deploy.startCommand: NGINX_INCLUDE_DIR=$(grep -Eo '/etc/nginx/(conf\.d|http\.d)' /etc/nginx/nginx.conf | head -n1 || true) && NGINX_INCLUDE_DIR=${NGINX_INCLUDE_DIR:-/etc/nginx/conf.d} && mkdir -p "$NGINX_INCLUDE_DIR" && sed "s/\$PORT/${PORT:-8080}/g" nginx.conf > "$NGINX_INCLUDE_DIR/default.conf" && php-fpm & nginx -g 'daemon off;'
